creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Wed, 05 Sep 2001 11:16:58 +0200,
Sheldon Hearn wrote:
> You're right.  How silly of me. Only exim and exim-monitor should appear
> on the first CDROM.

It seems those ports produce packages with the same name, exim-3.33.
Probably you should have set exim-monitor's PORTNAME to exim-monitor?


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/mail/exim-monitor/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.1
diff -u -u -r1.1 Makefile
--- Makefile	27 Aug 2001 13:19:10 -0000	1.1
+++ Makefile	5 Sep 2001 11:34:10 -0000
@@ -1,16 +1,17 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	exim-minitor
+# New ports collection makefile for:	exim-monitor
 # Date created:		27 August 2001
 # Whom:			sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/mail/exim-monitor/Makefile,v 1.1 2001/08/27 13:19:10 sheldonh Exp $
 #
 
-PORTNAME=	exim
+PORTNAME=	exim-monitor
 PORTVERSION=	3.33
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.csx.cam.ac.uk/pub/software/email/exim/ \
 		http://www.exim.org/ftp/ \
 		ftp://ftp.is.co.za/networking/mail/transport/exim/
+DISTNAME=	exim-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	sheldonh@FreeBSD.org

  a little bit stronger..  Experience slips away -- Time stand still"
